name: Line Chart
keywords: trend time-series growth timeline progress rate-of-change
best_for: Time dimension data; showing rise/fall trends over continuous period
avoid_when: Fewer than 4 data points (use stat card); more than 6 series (noise); no time axis
data_volume: <1000 pts: SVG; >=1000 Canvas+downsampling; >10000 aggregate to intervals
a11y_notes: Differentiate series by line style (solid/dashed/dotted) not color alone; add pattern overlays
a11y_fallback: Dashed/dotted lines per series; togglable data table with timestamps
color_guidance: Primary #0080FF; multiple series: distinct colors + distinct line styles

name: Bar Chart Vertical
keywords: compare categories ranking value comparison magnitude
best_for: Comparing discrete categories by magnitude; ranking is core insight; categories <=15
avoid_when: Categories >15 (use table); data has time dimension (use line); showing proportions (use stacked)
a11y_notes: Value labels on each bar by default; sort control for user reordering
a11y_fallback: Value labels always visible; provide CSV export
color_guidance: Each bar distinct color; grouped same hue family; sort descending

name: Bar Chart Horizontal
keywords: horizontal bar rank league leaderboard comparison long-labels
best_for: Long category labels; ranking/leaderboard patterns; categories 5-20
avoid_when: Fewer than 5 items (use stat cards); time dimension data (use line)
a11y_notes: Labels visible; sorted by value; axis labels clear
a11y_fallback: Value labels on all bars; downloadable table
color_guidance: Rank-ordered colors from high to low; same hue family

name: Pie Chart Donut
best_for: <=5 categories; one dominant segment vs rest; visual proportion emphasis
data_volume: Max 6 slices; beyond that use stacked bar
a11y_notes: Pie charts fail WCAG for colorblind users; slices rely on color alone; avoid as primary
a11y_fallback: Must provide stacked bar alternative + percentage data table as mandatory fallback
color_guidance: 5-6 max colors; contrasting palette; largest slice at 12 o'clock; always label with %
source: WCAG 2.2 SC 1.4.1 -- low score; use with fallback

name: Scatter Plot
keywords: correlation distribution relationship pattern cluster outlier
best_for: Exploring relationship between two continuous variables; identifying clusters
avoid_when: Variables are categorical (use grouped bar); fewer than 20 points; mobile-primary
data_volume: <500 SVG; 500-5000 Canvas 0.6-0.8 opacity; >5000 hexbin or aggregate
a11y_notes: Provide data table alternative; combine color + shape for colorblind users
a11y_fallback: Data table with correlation coefficient; shape markers (circle/square/triangle) per group
color_guidance: Color axis gradient (blue to red); bubble size relative to 3rd variable; opacity 0.6-0.8

name: Area Chart
keywords: area fill cumulative volume trend stacked flow
best_for: Cumulative trends; showing volume over time; comparing stacked categories
avoid_when: Too many overlapping areas (>3) obscures data; negative values (use bar)
data_volume: Same as line chart: downsampling at 1000+
a11y_notes: Fill patterns differ per series; not just color; semi-transparent 0.5-0.7 opacity
a11y_fallback: Pattern fills per series; data table with download
color_guidance: Semi-transparent colors 50-70% opacity; pattern fills for colorblind

name: Heat Map
keywords: heatmap density intensity grid matrix correlation cross-tab
best_for: Showing density/intensity across two dimensions; time x category matrices
avoid_when: Small datasets (<20 cells); when exact values matter over pattern; accessibility-first
data_volume: Any size; use CSS grid for small; D3 for large
a11y_notes: Color scale must include text labels; provide data table; sequential scale not diverging for density
a11y_fallback: Full data table as primary; heatmap as supplementary visual
color_guidance: Sequential single-hue scale preferred; diverging (blue-white-red) for deviation only

name: Waffle Chart
keywords: waffle grid part-to-whole proportion accessible alternative-to-pie
best_for: Accessible alternative to pie; showing part-to-whole with 1-100 cells
avoid_when: Categories >5; when precise % matters over visual metaphor; dense dashboards
a11y_notes: Each cell readable; legend with color+pattern+text; screen reader count exposed via aria
a11y_fallback: aria-label with percentage; full breakdown list
color_guidance: Colorblind-safe palette; add patterns; no more than 5 categories

name: Stat Card
keywords: KPI metric number single stat headline counter large
best_for: Single KPI; headline metric; sparkline companion; at-a-glance dashboard
avoid_when: When trend or breakdown context needed; when comparing many dimensions
a11y_notes: Number + label + unit all visible; aria-label on the card
a11y_fallback: No special fallback needed; text-first design already accessible
color_guidance: High contrast text on card bg; status color only for positive/negative (always with icon+text)

name: Funnel Chart
keywords: funnel conversion drop-off pipeline stages flow
best_for: Conversion funnels; pipeline stages; showing where users drop off
avoid_when: When stage order doesn't matter; fewer than 3 stages
a11y_notes: Label each stage with count + percent; arrows indicate direction
a11y_fallback: Numbered stage labels; data table; percentage text on each stage
color_guidance: Sequential single-hue darkening; stage labels in high-contrast text

name: Gantt Chart
keywords: gantt timeline project tasks schedule dependency duration
avoid_when: Real-time data; when tasks are very short (<1 day resolution on multi-month chart)
a11y_notes: Row labels always visible; color-coded categories with text label too; keyboard nav via arrow keys
a11y_fallback: Flat text timeline table as fallback; CSV export
color_guidance: Category color-coded; each category has text label not just color

name: Treemap
keywords: treemap hierarchy nested proportion drill-down part-to-whole-hierarchy
best_for: Hierarchical part-to-whole; file system sizes; category proportions in 2D
avoid_when: More than 2-3 levels deep (too complex); on mobile (too small to interact); accessibility-first
a11y_notes: Treemaps rely heavily on visual area perception; require text labels minimum 12px in cells
a11y_fallback: Full expandable tree table as primary interface; treemap as supplementary only
color_guidance: Color by category with text; limit to 6-8 distinct colors; always label cells

name: Radar Chart
keywords: radar spider web polygon multi-dimensional profile comparison
best_for: Comparing multiple entities across same dimensions; performance profiles
avoid_when: More than 5-6 axes (too complex); when differences between entities are very small
a11y_notes: Provide numeric table with all values; label each axis clearly; color-blind-safe per entity
a11y_fallback: Full data table as primary; radar as supplementary
color_guidance: Color per entity + shape (filled/outlined/dashed); 3-5 entities max

name: Sparkline
keywords: sparkline inline mini trend compact row
best_for: Inline trend in tables or dashboards; compact trend without axis
avoid_when: When axes context matters; when comparing across sparklines (use grouped line chart)
a11y_notes: aria-label with trend direction: 'Revenue trend: up 12% this week'
a11y_fallback: Text trend summary next to sparkline: 'up 12%'
color_guidance: Single color per sparkline; status color (green/red) with text label too

name: Candlestick Chart
keywords: candlestick OHLC stock financial trading price range
best_for: Financial OHLC price data; trading interfaces; stock charts
avoid_when: Non-financial data; non-expert audiences; accessibility-first contexts
a11y_notes: Red/green + filled/hollow distinction; provide hover tooltip with all 4 values; data table required
a11y_fallback: OHLC data table with all values; accessible color scheme (blue/orange not red/green)
color_guidance: Use direction (up filled / down hollow) not just color; blue/orange colorblind-safe option

name: Box Plot
keywords: boxplot distribution quartile outlier statistical spread
best_for: Statistical distribution; comparing spread across groups; outlier detection
avoid_when: Non-statistical audiences; when median alone is sufficient (use bar)
a11y_notes: Label median Q1 Q3 whiskers explicitly; provide summary statistics table
a11y_fallback: Statistics table: min Q1 median Q3 max per group
color_guidance: Color per group; pattern fill optional; outlier dots labeled

name: Bubble Chart
best_for: Three-variable comparison; showing magnitude + two other dimensions
avoid_when: Four or more variables (too complex to parse); on mobile (too small)
a11y_notes: Size + color + shape to distinguish; data table required; label outliers directly
a11y_fallback: Data table with all three variables; shape markers per category
color_guidance: Color by category; size represents 3rd variable; opacity 0.7 to show overlap
